title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates:
Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates!
